text.message: Nothing is good for me here
Still tying to piece together how this is apparently the best board ever, one that makes red table talk even before I place things down
im tryna figure it out too
I guess he was looking at the 8-4-3 6-9-3?
like does he mean the ore?
i assume he means the ore
But blue that’s not even a good combo
yea could be all the ore
like what are you gonna do w that
That’s why it’s so dumb lol
I think red just wanted to deflect
the brick port it good if red doesn't get to it first
red will get to it first
red just wins if i dont take 10 9 2 huh
I would usually say no but given how hard he went against me
Oh my god guys. We have to solo red every turn because he’s so strong. It’s over
at least he didnt get my road
i mean me and green are just cooked
i got left in a bad spot
If I had taken 8 4 10 red would have soloed me all game
People who table talk like that are not good players
but i agree it was not worthy of a table talk
Idk I thought you really would win that setup
Instead of what you have now
But maybe you proof me wrong
I am doing fine. Everyone but me has been rolling 7s so I’m not the happiest about that
think it's cause I had all wood
But thanks for robbing me red
That 4 8 10 wouldve won you the game?
You robbed me instead of blue remember
Maybe it’s because…you don’t know how the game works
If I had 4 8 10 I’d have a lot of ore and 0 wheat
I chose the best spot for expansion
Red PLEASE for the love of god
Yuo didnt trad eme last turn
hes a turn ahead and has 5 devs
If I pace then he can’t use other devs
Red I need this please dude
Yuo couldve jsut traded me thre grain
If blue didn’t care if I paced or not he’d not tell me I have no chance
you're gonna be disgusted by the devs I drew
I have double mono 3 knights 1 vp
how do you not get this
he has 2 monos and a vp
He can’t use the monos if I keep pacing army
you dont think he will settle
Gimme whole hand lemme prove it to you
we get it you think you can win with double play
I'll just keep knighting until I can use the mono man
You gotta for the sake of the game
